name: Stoneletter Guild
specialty: An elite team of Patchwork Saints known for their unparalleled ability to navigate the chaotic rifts, recovering valuable artifacts and resources from the shattered realms.

members.name: Elysia Stonehollow
members.note: Scarred face, a reminder of past battles that only hardens her resolve

members.name: Jax Argentshroud
members.note: Always carries a white fox named Luna, a gift from the Patchwork Saints

members.name: Thorgrim Ironfist
members.note: Twin hammers, one made from a rare metallic alloy, the other from stone

members.name: Mira Shatteredwing
members.note: In possession of a mysterious healing potion rumored to resurrect the dead

visual: Clad in patched, leather armor, their gear is a mishmash of salvaged materials and unique relics from other worlds. They carry themselves with a quiet determination, often seen discussing strategy at the city's edge before venturing into the rifts.
reputation_note: Whispers of their success have made them both respected and feared throughout the Undercity. A rumor persists that they are seeking a legendary artifact said to grant immense power to the one who wields it.
